creator: mark@reidel.info
text:
> Maintainer of audio/ncmpc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/130173 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/130173

I approve the patch, but I cannot test it, because I'm not using this
software anymore. If submitter wants to take over maintainership, he's
very welcome to do so.

- Mark
